task_completion.description: Navigate to the Lost Reasons configuration page in Odoo CRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Odoo CRM interface with the 'Lost Reasons' list or configuration page open.

task_completion.description: Create the lost reason 'Chose a Competitor'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the creation form for 'Chose a Competitor' or the text 'Chose a Competitor' appearing as a new entry in the Lost Reasons list.

task_completion.description: Create the lost reason 'Project Cancelled' (or 'Project Canceled').
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the creation form for 'Project Cancelled' (or 'Project Canceled') or the text appearing as a new entry in the Lost Reasons list.

task_completion.description: Create the lost reason 'Decision Maker Left Company'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the creation form for 'Decision Maker Left Company' or the text appearing as a new entry in the Lost Reasons list.

task_completion.description: Ensure all three new lost reasons are added as separate entries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A final screenshot of the Lost Reasons list view clearly showing 'Chose a Competitor', 'Project Cancelled' (or 'Project Canceled'), and 'Decision Maker Left Company' as three distinct rows.

task_completion.description: Ensure existing default reasons are not modified or deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshot of the Lost Reasons list view must still show default Odoo reasons (e.g., 'Too expensive', 'We don't have people/skills') alongside the newly created ones.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web GUI to create the lost reasons.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the standard Odoo CRM layout, menus, and forms, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client to insert records directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of database management tools (like psql, pgAdmin) in the screenshots; all changes should be made through the Odoo frontend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating exactly three lost reasons in Odoo CRM: 'Chose a Competitor', 'Project Cancelled' (American spelling 'Project Canceled' is also acceptable), and 'Decision Maker Left Company'. These must be added as separate entries. Default reasons (e.g., 'Too expensive') must remain untouched in the system.
